summary: Backend testing of centralized event type resolution fix completed. All 11 tests pass. Found and FIXED a critical bug: messages.py was calling undefined function `_resolve_event_type_from_content` instead of the centralized `resolve_event_type` from utils/event_types.py. The fix correctly resolves all card types (birthday_card, thank_you_card, holiday_card, welcome_card, anniversary_card, congrats_card) to their respective event_types in the activity feed.

birthday_card_short_url_resolves.details: birthday_card short URL (no explicit event_type) resolves to birthday_card_sent via DB lookup

birthday_card_explicit_event_type.details: Explicit event_type=birthday_card_sent from frontend is used directly

thank_you_card_short_url_resolves.details: thank_you_card short URL resolves to thank_you_card_sent via DB lookup

holiday_card_short_url_resolves.details: holiday_card short URL resolves to holiday_card_sent via DB lookup

welcome_card_short_url_resolves.details: welcome_card short URL resolves to welcome_card_sent via DB lookup

anniversary_card_short_url_resolves.details: anniversary_card short URL resolves to anniversary_card_sent via DB lookup

congrats_card_short_url_resolves.details: congrats_card short URL correctly resolves to congrats_card_sent (control case)

regular_sms_resolves_to_personal_sms.details: Regular SMS without special content resolves to personal_sms

events_endpoint_returns_correct_labels.details: GET /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/events returns events with correct labels

pydantic_endpoint_explicit_event_type.details: POST /api/messages/send/{user_id}/{conversation_id} with explicit event_type works correctly

all_card_link_types_stored_correctly.details: All card link_types (birthday_card, thank_you_card, thankyou_card, holiday_card, welcome_card, anniversary_card, congrats_card) are stored correctly in short_urls collection

undefined_function_error.issue: Code was calling `_resolve_event_type_from_content(content, db)` which doesn't exist
undefined_function_error.fix: Changed to call `resolve_event_type(content, db)` from utils/event_types.py module

seed_data_creation: Created test short URLs with all card link_types: birthday_card, thank_you_card, thankyou_card, holiday_card, welcome_card, anniversary_card, congrats_card
context_for_next_testing_agent: The centralized event type resolution fix is complete. The utils/event_types.py module is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for event type resolution. All consumers (messages.py, congrats_cards.py, contact_events.py, short_urls.py) import from this module. Key mappings: birthday_card->birthday_card_sent, thank_you_card->thank_you_card_sent, holiday_card->holiday_card_sent, welcome_card->welcome_card_sent, anniversary_card->anniversary_card_sent, congrats_card->congrats_card_sent. The bug where all cards showed 'Congrats Card Sent' is FIXED.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS sends are logged but not actually delivered
